reviews.review_description:
Wow, this game really blew me away! As a huge fan of the Backrooms, I couldn't wait to check out the Pool Rooms level, and it did not disappoint. From the moment I stepped into those eerie, endless water-filled hallways, I was completely hooked.

The graphics are absolutely stunning. Every little detail, from the ripples in the water to the shadows on the walls, makes you feel like you’re really there. And the sound design? Amazing. The echoing drips and mysterious noises in the distance kept me on edge the whole time.

What I loved most is how the game makes you feel totally lost and disoriented, just like the Backrooms are supposed to. The atmosphere is so tense and immersive, it’s like you can almost feel the isolation. I spent hours just exploring and soaking in the creepy vibes.

If you're into the Backrooms or just love atmospheric horror games, you’ve got to play this. Huge props to the developers for bringing the Pool Rooms to life in such an incredible way. Highly recommend it!
